title: ComponentManifest
description: COMPONENT_MANIFEST Spec v1.0.0 — machine-readable descriptor for a UI component, designed for AI coding assistants and design system tooling.

id.description: Kebab-case unique identifier used by tooling for lookups.

name.description: Display name shown in documentation and tooling.

tier.description: Position of the component in the design system hierarchy.

domain.description: Product domain this component belongs to. Use "neutral" for general-purpose components.

description.description: One-sentence description written for an AI audience — precise, not marketing copy.

props.description: Full prop API for the component.

usageExamples.description: Code examples an AI can use to generate correct usage. Must include at least one.

compositionGraph.description: Sub-components this component is composed from. Atoms must use an empty array.

designIntent.description: The 'why' behind visual and interaction decisions. The key field for AI-legibility — conveys context that prop types alone cannot.

specVersion.description: Spec version this manifest conforms to. Format: MAJOR.MINOR (e.g. "1.0").

PropDescriptor.description: Describes a single prop in a component's public API.

name.description: Prop name as it appears in the component API.

type.description: TypeScript type or well-known type name.

default.description: Default value as a string representation (e.g. "false", "\"primary\"").

description.description: Human-readable description for AI and documentation.

UsageExample.description: A copy-paste code snippet demonstrating component usage.

description.description: Optional description of what this example demonstrates.

CompositionNode.description: A sub-component used in the composition of this component.

role.description: How this sub-component is used in the composition.

required.description: Whether this sub-component is always present (true) or conditional (false).

role.description: ARIA role applied to the root element.

ariaAttributes.description: ARIA attributes used by this component.

keyboardInteractions.description: Keyboard interactions supported by this component.

notes.description: Plain-English notes for screen reader behaviour.
